name: switch-field
title: BTSwitchField
description: A toggle switch atom with track + thumb animation. Supports on/off, disabled, and error states. Labels and subtext can appear on the left side, right side, or both simultaneously. An inner text variant shows a short label inside the pill track.

files.content:
export { default as BTSwitchField } from './BTSwitchField.vue';
